narrative:
Sandy township has 2,132 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a clear Republican lean of 6.0 percentage points.
